Class User

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.User
public class User extends Object

Title: User Class

Description: This User class represents a user entity in the system. It contains the user's details such as userName, password, and roles being played.

Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025

Author:
Lynn Robert Carter

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User()

      Method: User()

      Description: This default constructor is not used in this system.

    • User

      public User(String userName, String password, String fn, String mn, String ln, String pfn, String ea, boolean r1, boolean r2, boolean r3)

      Method: User(String userName, String password, boolean r1, boolean r2, boolean r3, boolean r4, boolean r5)

      Description: This constructor is used to establish user entity objects.

      Parameters:
      userName - specifies the account userName for this user
      password - specifies the account password for this user
      r1 - specifies the the Admin attribute (TRUE or FALSE) for this user
      r2 - specifies the the Student attribute (TRUE or FALSE) for this user
      r3 - specifies the the Staff attribute (TRUE or FALSE) for this user

  • Method Details

    • setAdminRole

      public void setAdminRole(boolean role)

      Method: void setAdminRole(boolean role)

      Description: This setter defines the Admin role attribute.

      Parameters:
      role - is a boolean that specifies if this user in playing the Admin role.

    • setStudentRole

      public void setStudentRole(boolean role)

      Method: void setStudentRole(boolean role)

      Description: This setter defines the student role attribute.

      Parameters:
      role - is a boolean that specifies if this user is playing student role.

    • setStaffRole

      public void setStaffRole(boolean role)

      Method: void setStaffRole(boolean role)

      Description: This setter defines the staff role attribute.

      Parameters:
      role - is a boolean that specifies if this user is playing staff role.

    • getAdminRole

      public boolean getAdminRole()

      Method: String getAdminRole()

      Description: This getter returns the value of the Admin role attribute.

      Returns:
      a String of "TRUE" or "FALSE" based on state of the attribute

      public boolean getStudentRole()

      Description: This getter returns the value of the student role attribute.

      Returns:
      a boolean based on state of the attribute

      Returns:
      a boolean based on state of the attribute

    • getNumRoles

      public int getNumRoles()

      Method: int getNumRoles()

      Description: This getter returns the number of roles this user plays (0 - 5).

      Returns:
      a value 0 - 5 of the number of roles this user plays
